summary:
SPIRITUAL TRANSLATION AND THE TEMPLE VISION: Brandon recounts praying in a Chinese-like dialect when he was suddenly spiritually transported through a jungle-like environment into a transparent, platinum-like temple. Inside, Brandon observed a throne and a being who identified as I Am that I Am, causing the temple's foundation to shake. Brandon describes witnessing a blinding, three-staged light and living water flowing from the altar, deepening from ankle-level to a fathomless drop. During this encounter, God's spoken words manifested physically as growing seeds, and a massive eye containing dancing fire emerged from the light.

END-TIME REVIVAL AND ESCHATOLOGY: Brandon details a conversation with God regarding eschatology and the concept of an end-time revival. God spoke in a deep, thunderous heavenly language that Brandon comprehended in English, instructing Brandon to study the original Greek text rather than relying solely on the King James or Amplified versions. God clarified that He controls time and will return only when the church is prepared, describing a great spiritual shifting analogous to the shucking of corn to cleanse the church, which Brandon observed as a bride in a lace gown soiled with soot. Brandon observed another preacher interceding for an outpouring of the Spirit, and a mandate for believers to take dominion rather than adopt an escape mentality.

FINANCIAL CORRECTION AND SPIRITUAL DIRECTION: Brandon relays a specific correction he received regarding his prayers for million-dollar ideas. God categorized this pursuit as idolatry, instructing Brandon to seek the kingdom of God first rather than prioritizing financial wealth. God assured Brandon that financial blessings would follow once he could be trusted with the outflow of money, emphasizing the importance of seeking a daily, intimate relationship to hear God's secrets.

PROPHECIES CONCERNING AMERICA AND GLOBAL HEALING: Brandon shares prophetic statements regarding the United States, noting God's promise that America will remain a sheep nation rather than a goat nation. This preservation is attributed to the covenant made by the founding fathers at Plymouth Rock and the prayers of figures like George Washington. God explained that current national difficulties represent divine correction rather than judgment. Brandon concludes his account by describing a vision of future glory domes in the center of America where people gather for miraculous healings, sparking a revival that spreads across Europe, Africa, and the rest of the world.
rawData: [April 28, 2024]-[My supernatural experience in the throne room of God - It's time for demonstrations and manifestation]-[https://youtu.be/25KXmNF-K0k]-[Hi, my name is Brandon. I've had—I won't call it a visitation, but I saw some things when I was praying in the spirit, and I want to tell you what the Lord showed me. All right, here we go. I was praying just like I do on a normal night. It wasn't anything special; there wasn't anything different about the prayer. I was just interceding, and it was in a Chinese-like dialect. It was different, but it was deep intercession, so I figured I was praying for somebody. In my spirit eyes, what the Lord opens up to me whenever I'm interceding for somebody, or the country, or whatever—a lot of times he'll give me cues and show me the direction I'm going or who I'm praying for. In this, I started to go into deep groanings. It was very intense, different than any other time I've had in a long time. Out of my innermost being, out of my spirit, it was coming up and rolling out of me. In my intercession, I couldn't get tongues out fast enough for what I was interceding for. It's like I birthed it, and I was translated in my spirit eyes. I was in this jungle-like place, and that’s all I could see on both sides of me, but I was being ushered in. It was like I was being pushed from behind very quickly, and all of a sudden, I saw this temple in front of me. I went into this temple that was like beautiful platinum, but it wasn't gold or silver; it was see-through, almost transparent, the most beautiful metal. I don't know what the throne room was; I've never seen that on this Earth before. I went into this temple and saw this being on a throne. It was carved out and beautiful. I could see the throne, but I could only see a glimpse. I looked up because, as I walked in, he was high and lifted up. I glimpsed and thought in my spirit, 'Where am I? Who is this?' And he said, 'I Am that I Am.' When he said that, he shook the whole temple. The foundation, everything was being shaken by his words. I screamed; it freaked me out because it was so powerful. At that time, I glanced up to the top and could see this gold and this red ruby. It was gorgeous. All of a sudden, a light beyond any kind of light I've ever seen appeared. There's nothing on this Earth as bright as what I saw. You can look at the sun at noon, and it's still not as bright. There were three stages of light: a light that wasn't as bright, a brighter light, and then the center light. The light in the center was so bright it was piercing; if you looked at it, it would melt you. I couldn't look at it. I could see the outer light, but I tried to glance up and it was piercing me. It was incredible; words cannot describe what I'm trying to say. The English vocabulary does not wrap around my intellect to tell you what I was seeing. Let me say it like living water. When he spoke, his words would go out and stay alive. I can't skip around too far. Whenever I was at the altar, there was water at the base of it. It was ankle-deep, knee-deep, and waist-deep, and then you could see in the deep it went over an edge and went way down. In this water, you could take your whole body all the way to the bottom. The water was the clearest, bluest, most beautiful water I've ever seen. You could just drink it and want more because the water was so perfect. It was flowing out of the throne, flowing out of him; it was living water. He spoke to me for about an hour in this encounter about the end times, the church, and personal stuff about my life and family. When he spoke, his words would come out of that light in English, but they would be really big, then stop upon the water and get smaller until they turned into a seed. The words wouldn't die; they remained alive and would start to grow. They were like a seed right in front of your face. They started growing and cultivating roots, like a potato or a peanut in a farm. The words became alive. Every time he would speak, they would start to form and grow together. I know the Bible says we are made in his image, but he is God. All of a sudden, out of that light, a massive eyeball came out. It was an all-seeing eye. It came right up within probably fifteen feet of me. It was everything I could do not to wet myself; that’s how intense and scary it was. All I wanted to do was cry out in repentance and ask God to forgive me. He is holy and merciful. It shook me to the core. In that eye, in the iris, there was fire. The fire was growing and moving; it was alive. The flames were dancing upon each other. It was so intense. Every time he spoke, the words came out of that light. He talked to me about a verse I had been discussing with him. I’ve been hearing from certain ministers that there is no end-time revival, but I was asking him about this. I quoted the scripture, 'As the days of Noah, so will it be when the Son of Man returns.' They were put in the boat and left; there was no big revival. I was praying in tongues, and he was speaking to me in tongues. His tongue was very deep and masculine, like echoes, like living water flowing out of him. It was a heavenly language I’ve never heard before. His tongue was like roaring thunder when he spoke, but I understood everything he was saying. When I spoke in tongues, he understood me. We were talking to each other, and I understood him in English in my ears even though it was in tongues. He was speaking to me as 'I Am that I Am.' I hope my words are giving some justice to this. He said, 'Son, you have no idea the real translation of those scriptures. You need to go back to the Greek and study my word more than just the King James or the Amplified versions. Study the meaning of each word.' He asked, 'Who says that I'm coming back right now?' I mentioned the signs of the times. He said, 'I am in control of time,' and he shook the foundation of the temple. 'I will come back when I am ready. I said in my word that I'm coming back for a spotless bride, and the bride is not ready yet. My Son's return—he doesn't even know, nor the angels in heaven. I will come back when I am ready.' I was quoting scriptures back to him with my little peanut brain, but he was quoting back a thousand more. It was just flowing out of him. He said, 'I want to show you something.' I hope I’m not skipping around, but the Spirit will bring stuff back to me. There was a preacher—I will not release his name—who was interceding on the Earth. The Lord allowed me to hear his prayer. I was standing at the altar, and I saw a shaft of light like a flaming comet coming up from the Earth. It circled the throne room; they were prayers echoing from this man. He was interceding for the continents of the world, and they were coming up before the Father. This man came to the throne room in the spirit, and a transparent globe wrapped around him. Beams of light were coming out of his belly, shooting to places on the globe like South America, Europe, Asia, America, and Canada. He was interceding for an end-time revival. The Lord told me, 'Go and tell this family member that their theology of no end-time revival is nonsense. There will be a great revival, a harvest of souls, an outpouring of my Spirit, and many healings. I will not be defeated, and you will not be defeated. You will walk in a great victory in these last days. I am not coming back for a church that is weak and defeated. You will go forth into this world and do what I've called you to do with great victory.' He said many people have an escape mentality. 'You will not have an escape mentality because times are hard. You will press into me and walk in my glory. I never designed the armor for retreat; I designed it for charging ahead and taking dominion.' He said the teaching that there is no end-time revival is nonsense. When he said that, he was angry, and it shook the foundation. He said there are challenging times ahead. There's a great shifting—like corn being shucked. He said, 'I'm going to shuck the corn, son.' I'm from Oklahoma, so I get that. 'We're going to pull it back, clean it up, and make it ready.' He showed me the bride in the throne room. She had a beautiful lace gown, but it had black spots and smudges like soot. He said, 'I told you in my word that I'm coming back for a spotless bride. It's time for you to come out of the ankle-deep water and come to the deeper water.' I wanted to go in that deep water so bad. He said, 'Brandon, you've been in that deeper water before. It's like muscle memory. You'll build your muscles up spiritually and just flow back into it. Seek me.' He talked to me about finances because I’ve been praying for million-dollar ideas. He said sternly, 'Where in my word did I tell you to pray like that? Seek first the kingdom, and all these things will be added unto you. Seeking finances that way is idolatry. Seek me, and I will give you the secret things. I have no problem blessing you with money as long as that money doesn't have you. As soon as I can trust you with that outflow, you'll have it.' I told him I was sorry and that I wanted to be spotless and usable. Jesus is coming back for a victorious church, not one that is retreating. The gospel that must be preached is repentance. We must seek his face and know his heart. He said, 'If you lay your head upon my chest every day, I will whisper the secret things to you in a still, small voice.' I was interceding for America and crying out for revival on the East Coast. He told me, 'I will not let America become a goat nation, for your founding fathers made a covenant with me.' He took me to Plymouth Rock and showed me the pilgrims making a covenant and taking communion. He said those prayers still echo in his ears. I saw George Washington crying out on the battlefield, and God gave him strength and victory. The Lord said those men died for freedom, and he will not let their blood go. He said what we are going through now is not judgment, but correction. 'True judgment is separation from me for eternity. This is just correction. You will be a sheep nation.' He said things are coming to this area and we must draw close to him to hear what's coming. There's a shaking coming, but it's a father's love. A great revival is coming, and no man will get the glory. I saw glory domes where people were healed by the power of God. People were coming from everywhere to be part of it. There was revival happening everywhere, but especially in the center of America. Lives were being changed throughout the world—Europe, Africa, everywhere. I want to thank you all for listening. I pray, Father, in the name of Jesus, that you anoint these people to do something great. Pour out your Spirit. We are the head and not the tail. I take authority over sickness and disease right now. Satan, leave them alone. I call them healed and whole by the power of the blood of Jesus, from the top of their heads to the soles of their feet. Thank you for the blood and for forgiving our sins. I give you praise and glory for what you're about to do. In Jesus' name, have a blessed day, and I appreciate you listening. Bye-bye.]
